badge: Sri Lanka's First Time Exchange Platform
hero_sub: Exchange skills, not money. Help someone for 1 hour and earn 1 Time Credit. Use it whenever you need help. Everyone's time is equal.
how_sub: No money needed. Just your time and skills.
step1_desc: Sign up free. Add your skills — cooking, coding, teaching, anything!
step2_desc: AI finds the best skill match for you in the community.
step3_desc: Help someone 1 hour — get 1 Time Credit in your wallet.
step4_desc: Use your credits to get help from anyone in the community.
about_text: TimeBank is a community platform where your TIME is your currency. No money needed. Everyone helps each other with their skills and time.
point3: AI matches you with the right people
cta_sub: Be part of Sri Lanka's first time exchange community. Free forever.
footer: Made with love in Sri Lanka
